content:
I am Guilherme Carvalho, a full‑stack developer focused on building efficient and scalable web solutions.
My main stack includes TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL, always guided by Clean Architecture principles and good software engineering practices.
This blog is my space to document learnings and share real‑world development experiences.
Contact Email: dev.gcarvalho@gmail.com GitHub: guilhermercarvalho LinkedIn: guilhermercarvalho Portfolio: guilhermercarvalho.github.io “Good code is measurable code.”
